tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set status disable
    next
    edit 3
        set status disable
    next
    edit 4
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_WEB"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action accept
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Allow required outbound web traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
    edit 5
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUTBOUND"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Block arbitrary outbound traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
    move 4 before 100
    move 5 after 4
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
